reviews.comment:
Generalmente es bueno el servicio, hoy 12/07 las chicas de turno muy mala atención, las cosas frías, el baño sucio, el ambiente sin música...

(Translated by Google)
The service is generally good, but today, July 12, the girls on duty were very rude, the toilets were cold, the bathroom was dirty, and the atmosphere was lacking in music...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7652943530366249800/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURPbzl1UmlnRRAB

reviews.comment:

They are very friendly and take all the time to explain how to pay with the app

reviews.comment:
Desayunamos en la YPF. Buena atención. Lugar limpio. Habia nevado lo que fue una linda experiencia.

(Translated by Google)
We had breakfast at YPF. Good service. Clean place. It had snowed, so it was a nice experience.

reviews.comment:
Muy rapida atencion, sillas y sillones muy comodos, ventanales amplios y tienen galletitas sin tac.

(Translated by Google)
Very fast service, very comfortable chairs and armchairs, large windows, and they have gluten-free cookies.
